query:
UPDATE affiliate_commissions
              SET status = CASE
                              WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 'clawback_pending'
                              ELSE 'clawed_back'
                          END,
                  updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE source_order_id = $1
              AND status NOT IN ('clawed_back', 'clawback_pending')
        RETURNING affiliate_id
